import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut sum = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          sum = sum + v
          count = count + 1
          ()
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      sum = sum + v
      count = count + 1
      ()
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  let avg = sum / count
  println("avg=#{avg}")
end
